notes: Aleph is Runway's July-2025 in-context video model, named after aleph (א), the first letter of the Hebrew/Semitic alphabet. Stress falls on the first syllable: AH-lef, with a broad "ah" /ɑː/; the -lif variant (AH-lif) is equally attested. Non-native devs often mis-stress it as "uh-LEFF" (second-syllable stress with a reduced first vowel) the second-syllable stress is wrong, while a long-a "AY-lef" /ˈeɪlɛf/ is a valid but less common dictionary variant. Non-obvious because the spelled "a" is the open /ɑ/, not a schwa or the English long-a, and Runway's own announcement never states a pronunciation or name origin.
